top_signals.title: HTX keeps rotating wallets to evade UK sanctions screening: TRM Labs
top_signals.summary: UK authorities sanctioned the crypto exchange in May for its alleged role in facilitating Russian sanctions evasion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Boeing on track for 2028 Air Force One delivery, costs rise
top_signals.summary: Boeing remains on track to deliver two new Air Force One jets in 2028, but meeting that target will require additional spending.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Galaxy sets up $5 million fund to help shield Bitcoin against quantum computing threats
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Commission publishes guidelines on transparency obligations for providers and deployers of certain AI systems
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 20 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission published guidelines to assist providers and deployers of artificial intelligence (AI) systems in meeting the AI Act's transparency obligations, which start to apply on 2 August 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission endorses Latvia's €617 million Social Climate Plan
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 20 Jul 2026 The European Commission endorsed Latvia's Social Climate Plan — the third national plan approved under the new Social Climate Fund. Using carbon pricing revenues, the Fund ensures a fair and inclusive clean transition for vulnerable citizens and businesses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission fines AliExpress €550 million for breaching the Digital Services Act
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 20 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission fined AliExpress €550 million for breaching its obligations under the Digital Services Act (DSA) to diligently assess and mitigate risks relating to the sale of illegal, unsafe or counterfeit products on its e-commerce platform. The Commission has ordered the platform to take action.

top_signals.title: Manchester was Burnham rehearsal – now get ready to pay the bill
top_signals.summary: Burnham has asked to be judged on Manchester – where his record is more spending, more borrowing and higher taxes, says Gareth Davies Andy Burnham walks into Downing Street with a simple pitch: judge me on Manchester. I am happy to take him up on it.  Start with tax. In 2018, Mr Burnham created a [...]
